However, realistically, players like Chris Paul (born 1985) are active and over 35. This discrepancy likely stems from incomplete or inaccurate data in Wikidata for the NBA team league relationships.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?player WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P576 ?team ; wdt:P569 ?birthDate .
  ?team wdt:P385 wd:Q414733 .
  FILTER(?birthDate < "1988-01-01" ^^ xsd:date)
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?player p:P576 ?statement ; pq:P582 ?endDate .
  }
}
```
